LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT CAROLIN THURM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT MOVED FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT SOLELY ON THE GROUNDS THAT SHE DID NOT ENTER APT.12 ON 10/3/08; HOWEVER PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ALSO ALLEGED TAHT DEFENDANT "THEREAFTER INTERFERED WITH THE EFFORTS OF THOSE CLEANING THE APARTMENT." BECAUSE PLAINTIFF ALSO ALLEGED THIS ADDITIONAL BASIS FOR DFENDANT'S EVICTION, AND DEFENDANT'S MOTION DOES NOT DISPOSE OF THAT BASIS, THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JACQUELINE CHAN, CSR# 10276

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jannik Catalano, Esq of Catalano & Poon, 510-238-8228 for defendant and moving party Carolyn Thurm
David Semel, Esq. of Zachs & Utrecht, et al, 415-956-8100 for plaintiff and opposing party Victor Guillermo

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT CAROLIN THURM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT MOVED FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT SOLELY ON THE GROUNDS THAT SHE DID NOT ENTER APT.12 ON 10/3/08; HOWEVER PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ALSO ALLEGED TAHT DEFENDANT "THEREAFTER INTERFERED WITH THE EFFORTS OF THOSE CLEANING THE APT." BECAUSE PLAINTIFF ALSO ALLEGED THIS ADDITIONAL BASIS FOR DFENDANT'S EVICTION, AND DEFENDANT'S MOTION DOES NOT DISPOSE OF THAT BASIS, THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Jacqueline Chan, CSR# 10276 (301/PJB/BD)
